sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15150" key="a)ri/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρί-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φρήν</etym>) <sense id="n15150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very wise</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prudent,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
